message:
chore: bump version to v1.0.1

Includes 20 commits since v1.0.0:
- fix(rchd): correct import ordering in api.rs test module
- refactor(rchd): move worker handler functions to workers.rs
- feat(scheduler): implement robust drift detection in benchmark_scheduler
- fix: improve daemon robustness with timeouts, logging, and cache bounds
- fix(hook): add timeouts and body size limits to daemon communication
- fix(test): prevent pipe buffer blocking in e2e test harness
- fix(windows): gate SSH and Unix-only code for cross-platform builds
- fix(platform): gate Unix socket and SSH imports behind cfg(unix)
- fix(ui): gate rich-ui imports and rendering behind unix cfg
- fix(ci): remove Windows from test matrix due to platform limitations

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -9,7 +9,7 @@ members = [
 ]
 
 [workspace.package]
-version = "1.0.0"
+version = "1.0.1"
 edition = "2024"
 license = "MIT"
 authors = ["Remote Compilation Helper Contributors"]
